sections.sectionTitle: Theigah Hoih leh Theigah tawh Thuhilhna

verses.text: Babylon Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem khua panin Jehoiakim' tapa Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin leh Judah kumpi uliante, khutsiamte leh sikseek siamte, Babylon khua-ah sal dingin a paikhiatpih khit ciangin Topa in hih maang hong musak hi. Topa' biakinn mai-ah theigah bawm nih dim ka mu hi
Bawm khat sunga theigahte, a min masate tawh kibangin limci mahmah hi. Ahih hangin a bawm khat pen sunga theigahte limci hetloin nektheih ding bang hi deklo hi

Topa in hong hopih a, “Jeremiah aw, bang mu na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Theigah ka mu hi. A limcite limci mahmah a, a limcilote limcilo lua ahih manin nektheih ding bang hilo hi,” ka ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in, “ Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in kong cihin-ah
Hih mun panin Khaldea mite' gama ka puakkhiat Judah mi saltangte hih theigah hoihte bangin a hoihin ka ngaihsun ding hi
Amaute limtakin ka kem ding a, hih gamah ka lakik ding hi. Amaute ka khangtosak ding a, ka susia kei ding hi; ka suan ding a, ka botkhia kei ding hi
Keimah Topa ka hihlam theihtheihna lungsim ka pia ding hi. A lungsim khempeuh uh tawh kei kiangah hong kileh ding uh ahih manin amaute ka mi ahi ding uh a, kei pen amaute' Pasian ka hi ding hi

“Ahih hangin Topa in kong cihin-ah: Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leh ama gam uk uliante-a kipan hih gamah a omsuak Jerusalem khuasunga a omlai sunteng leh Egypt gamah a tengte limcilo lua ahih manin a kine theilo theigahte bangin ka bawl ding hi
Amaute ka hawlkhiatna ding mun khempeuhah mite in kihamsiatna-in a zat dingun simmawhna leh zahkonate ka thuaksak ding a, amaute' thuakna hangin leitung gam khempeuh ka lausak ding hi
Namsau tawh kithahna, kialpi, leh pulnatnate ka tungsak ding a, amaute leh a pu a pate' kiangah ka piaksa gamsungah khat beek ka nungtasak nawn kei ding hi,” hong ci hi.
